opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't been able to empty my bladder for two whole days and my lower back feels like it's being crushed in a vice. I'm bursting but I can't pass a drop, and I can't even get up off the couch.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The back pain got much worse tonight and I still can't wee no matter how hard I try — I'm in agony and I'm on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: the trouble passing urine has crept up over the past year, but I completely stopped being able to go about two days ago; the back pain has been building for a month and flared badly tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: two days of not being able to pass urine; about a month of the deep back pain
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, aching, grinding pain in my lower back and pelvis that never really lets up, and a terrible bursting fullness low down in my belly
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the back pain is easily the worst pain I've had, and the bladder fullness is unbearable
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low back and pelvis for the ache; low in my belly for the bursting feeling
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the ache is there all the time and worse at night; tonight it all got much worse at once
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — the paracetamol I bought from the chemist does absolutely nothing
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, standing, and the longer I go without passing urine
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've lost a fair bit of weight without trying and I've gone right off my food; both my legs have swollen up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never been blocked up like this before, though my stream has been getting weaker and harder to start for a good while
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't stand or walk properly for the pain and I live on my own, so I can't manage

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: trouble passing urine that's been getting worse over the last year — weak stream and trouble getting started
past_medical_history.how_managed: never had it looked into properly

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else at home to help; has been feeling very run down and letting things slide, meals going uneaten

objective_data_offered.value: I've dropped about 8 kilos over the last few weeks without trying to
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient estimate, no scales reading given

objective_data_offered.value: both my lower legs and ankles have puffed up and look swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self-video description, not an examined finding
